mapper.sql: e1.empId, e1.password, e1.levelCode, e1.enabled, e1.empStatusCode, TO_CHAR(e1.lastLoginDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lastLoginDate, e1.loginFailureCount, TO_CHAR(e1.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS e1RegDate, TO_CHAR(e1.updateDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updateDate, e2.name, TO_CHAR(e2.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birth, e2.profilePhoto, e2.tel, e2.zip, e2.addr1, e2.addr2, e2.email, e2.ipAddr, ea.authority AS authorityCode, TO_CHAR(e2.hireDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS hireDate, e2.deptCode, e2.gradeCode, (SELECT cc.codeName FROM COMMONCODE cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'DEPT' AND cc.code = e2.deptCode) AS deptName, (SELECT cc.codeName FROM COMMONCODE cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'RANK' AND cc.code = e2.gradeCode) AS gradeName, (SELECT cc.codeName FROM COMMONCODE cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'AUTHORITY' AND cc.code = ea.authority) AS authorityName, (SELECT cc.codeName FROM COMMONCODE cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'EMPSTATUS' AND cc.code = e1.empstatuscode) AS empStatusName, e2.regEmpId, TO_CHAR(e2.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS e2RegDate, ( SELECT LISTAGG(pj.title, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pj.title) FROM empProject ep JOIN project pj ON ep.projectId = pj.projectId WHERE ep.empId = e1.empId ) AS projectNames
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee1 e1 JOIN employee2 e2 ON e1.empId = e2.empId

SELECT
FROM employee1 e1 JOIN employee2 e2 ON e1.empId = e2.empId JOIN employeeAuthority ea ON e1.empid = ea.empid
ORDER BY e2.name ORDER BY e1.empId ORDER BY e2.deptCode ORDER BY e2.gradeCode ORDER BY e1.empStatusCode ORDER BY e1.empId
DESC ASC
ORDER BY e1.empId DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM employee1 e1 JOIN employee2 e2 ON e1.empId = e2.empId WHERE e1.empId = #{empId}
SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(empId DEFAULT 0 ON CONVERSION ERROR)), 0) FROM employee1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee1 (empId, password, levelCode, enabled, empStatusCode, regDate, updateDate) VALUES (#{empId}, #{password}, #{levelCode, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{enabled, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{empStatusCode, jdbcType=CHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)

INSERT INTO employee2 (empId, name, birth, profilePhoto, tel, zip, addr1, addr2, email, hireDate, deptCode, gradeCode, regEmpId, regDate) VALUES (#{empId}, #{name}, #{birth, jdbcType=DATE}, #{profilePhoto, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{deptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gradeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE employee1 SET drawCode = 'y' WHERE empId = #{empId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO employee1 (empId, password, levelCode, enabled, empStatusCode, regDate, updateDate) VALUES ( #{dto.empId}, #{dto.password}, #{dto.levelCode, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.enabled, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.empStatusCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO employee2 (empId, name, birth, profilePhoto, tel, zip, addr1, addr2, email, hireDate, deptCode, gradeCode, regEmpId, regDate) VALUES ( #{dto.empId}, #{dto.name}, #{dto.birth, jdbcType=DATE}, #{dto.profilePhoto, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.zip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{dto.deptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.gradeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.regEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO employeeAuthority (empId, authority) VALUES (#{dto.empId}, #{dto.authorityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT code, codename AS codeName FROM commoncode WHERE codegroup = #{codeGroup} ORDER BY code
